prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-MATCH-CONTAINER-3-IN-1 Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Survivalist Waterproof Match Stick Storage Container with Fire Starter and Signal Mirror (Orange) Description: A must have for camping, backpacking, and hiking. This is a waterproof 3 in 1 match box container with a watertight seal, a fire starter on the bottom, and a convenient mirror in the cover.

At just 3 inches tall, this compact storage container can easily be put in your pocket or backpack and keep your matches and other small items safe and dry. The fire starter flint on the bottom is easy to use and great for any time you need to have a fire outdoors. The mirror is ideal for signalling, but can also serve as a mirror for yourself.

These storage containers are extremely lightweight and durable, and are a great addition to any survival kit. Don't forget one on your next adventure.

These match stick containers are durable and are great for camping, hiking, hunting, or for carrying in your survival kit. Search Terms: campfire matchbox outside storage box waterproof waterproof storage containers waterproof storage box waterproof matches matches box matches in a jar waterproof matches with case camping accessories camping gear camping stove campfire accessories Features: - Waterproof & Watertight seal - Mirror in Cover - Color: Green or Orange - Small Convenient Size (3" Tall) - Fire Starter Flint on Bottom === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3 in 1 Waterproof Match Container Orange

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof Seal, Fire Starter Flint, Signal Mirror, Compact 3 Inch Design, Survival Kit Essential
